summary: Built devpulse — a Node.js TypeScript CLI dashboard that polls system metrics every 2 seconds and renders a color-coded ANSI dashboard (CPU, memory, uptime, top processes) using only Node.js built-ins.
assumptions: Stack detected as new Node.js project (no existing package.json); used npm as package manager
tsx used as devDependency to run TypeScript directly; zero runtime npm dependencies
ps command uses BSD syntax (ps -axo pid,comm,%cpu) for macOS/Linux compatibility
